Actions.Text: REFERRED TO HOUSING, CONSTRUCTION AND COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT

Title: Relates to priority applicants under the housing access voucher pilot program
Summary: Relates to priority applicants under the housing access voucher pilot program; provides that priority shall both be given to applicants who are homeless and who are at risk of losing their federal rental subsidy.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public housing law, in relation to priority applicants under the housing access voucher pilot program
